ogTitle: Swede Flat vs Tailem Bend: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swede Flat and Tailem Bend.
heading: Swede Flat vs Tailem Bend — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swede Flat, South Australia and Tailem Bend, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tailem Bend has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Swede Flat (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swede Flat or Tailem Bend safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swede Flat has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tailem Bend scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swede Flat scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Tailem Bend scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swede Flat or Tailem Bend?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tailem Bend has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
